_comment: Connector-specific edits to GENERATED files that a cli-printing-press reprint must NOT clobber. check_handfixes.py asserts every marker below is still present (and banned anti-patterns absent) and fails CI if a reprint dropped one. Provenance: project_abnormal_print_gotchas.md (first print 2026-06-06, press 4.22.0). NOTE the big trap: a mid-build `generate --force` re-emits novel TODO stubs over implemented hand-authored novel files even without the generated header - do ALL spec repairs BEFORE implementing novels on any reprint.

handfixes.summary: Spec resources renamed to avoid reserved/collision: /search* -> email-search, /resources* -> api-resources (typed FTS table collided with framework resources_fts)
handfixes.why: `search` is a reserved template command (parse-time collision); `resources` collides with the framework `resources_fts` typed-FTS table - NOT caught at parse time, surfaces as store test failures ('no column named description') and silently-wrong runtime FTS. The renames produce the email-search / api-resources commands and typed store tables. A reprint without the x-pp-resource renames reintroduces the collisions.
handfixes.spec_encode_followup: These ARE spec-encoded (x-pp-resource on the affected paths in the abnormal spec); the markers below assert the rename survived into the generated CLI + store schema. Keep the x-pp-resource annotations on any spec re-copy.

handfixes.summary: ABNORMAL_BASE_URL (EU host override) is documented in guide.md env table + troubleshoots; the press omits the optional base-URL var from docs
handfixes.why: config.go reads ABNORMAL_BASE_URL as an optional override for EU tenants (https://eu.api.abnormalplatform.com/v1); the press doc generator only documents the bearer token (ABNORMAL_API_TOKEN). Without the override documented, EU customers get empty results / 4xx with no guidance. A reprint drops the EU-host documentation.

handfixes.summary: Vendor portal URL prose must not carry the markdown-quote trailing backtick harvested from spec prose (integrations`)
handfixes.why: The vendor spec prose put a markdown backtick after 'integrations', which the press harvested verbatim into helpers/auth/doctor/mcp-tools output (a runtime artifact, not just docs). Stripped during onboarding. A reprint re-harvests the trailing backtick.

handfixes.summary: manifest.json env-var description must use prose, not the literal portal URL (its /home/settings path trips the ci_guards personal-path guard)
handfixes.why: The vendor portal URL https://portal.abnormalsecurity.com/home/settings/integrations contains a /home/<word>/ segment that ci_guards' personal-filesystem-path guard false-flags as a hardcoded /home path. Original onboard de-pathed it to prose; a re-vendor re-introduces the URL.
